T

Task - Class in jellyfish.task
Represents a task with a description and completion status.
Task(String) - Constructor for class jellyfish.task.Task
Creates a task with the given description, marked as not done.
TaskList - Class in jellyfish
Manages the list of tasks, providing operations to add, delete, mark, and retrieve tasks.
TaskList() - Constructor for class jellyfish.TaskList
Creates an empty task list.
TaskList(ArrayList<Task>) - Constructor for class jellyfish.TaskList
Creates a task list pre-populated with the given tasks.
to - Variable in class jellyfish.task.Event
 
toDate - Variable in class jellyfish.task.Event
 
Todo - Class in jellyfish.task
Represents a todo task with no date or time attached.
Todo(String) - Constructor for class jellyfish.task.Todo
Creates a todo task with the given description.
toSaveFormat() - Method in class jellyfish.task.Deadline
Returns the deadline task in save file format.
toSaveFormat() - Method in class jellyfish.task.Event
Returns the event task in save file format.
toSaveFormat() - Method in class jellyfish.task.Task
Returns the task in save file format.
toSaveFormat() - Method in class jellyfish.task.Todo
Returns the todo task in save file format.
toString() - Method in class jellyfish.task.Deadline
Returns a string representation of the deadline task.
toString() - Method in class jellyfish.task.Event
Returns a string representation of the event task.
toString() - Method in class jellyfish.task.Task
 
toString() - Method in class jellyfish.task.Todo
Returns a string representation of the todo task.
